name: esp32-n64-transfer-pak-webui
description: Installable ESP32-C3 N64 controller and Transfer Pak dashboard.

scripts.build:fs: npm run build && cd .. && ~/.platformio/penv/bin/pio run --target buildfs
scripts.upload:fs: npm run build && cd .. && ~/.platformio/penv/bin/pio run --target uploadfs
scripts.upload:all: npm run build && cd .. && ~/.platformio/penv/bin/pio run --target upload && ~/.platformio/penv/bin/pio run --target uploadfs
